cleanz-clean up temporary files from 'build' command)
build-base=
bz2base build directory (default: 'build.build-base'))
build-lib=Nz<build directory for all modules (default: 'build.build-lib'))

tz7temporary build directory (default: 'build.build-temp'))
build-scripts=Nz<build directory for scripts (default: 'build.build-scripts'))
bdist-base=Nz+temporary directory for built distributions)
az7remove all build output, not just temporary by-productsr
